name: qa_manager_manage_scheduled_error_check_sweeps_per_project_and_user
desc: QA Manager scheduled QA sweep manager: CRUD + run_now on recurring Error Manager error-check sweeps fired by an in-process timer. Cadence grammar: every_N_minutes | daily_HH:MM | weekly_DOW_HH:MM | once_ISO8601. Each schedule can attach a rule set, capture images, and auto-export to excel/xml/html/pdf/word. Persists to .mepbridge/qa/schedules.json (project) with %APPDATA%/BuildMEP/QA fallback (user).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Existing schedule id. Required for update/remove/run_now.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Human-readable name for the schedule. Required for add.

parameters.name: cadence
parameters.description: Cadence token (every_60_minutes | daily_08:00 | weekly_MON_09:30 | once_2026-05-01T09:00:00Z). Required for add.

parameters.name: rule_set
parameters.description: Optional rule set name to use for the sweep.

parameters.name: capture_images
parameters.description: When true, queue CaptureAllClashResultImages after the sweep (default false).

parameters.name: export_format
parameters.description: Optional auto-export format after the sweep: excel | xml | html | pdf | word.
